calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion, Motion And Memorandum Of Poijts And Authorities In Support Of Judgment For Outstanding Rent And Attorneys' Fees And Costs
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha.
Proceedings reported by: Denise Doucette, CSR#5963.

Adam Dawson, Esq., for Plaintiff, Second & Howard 88 LLC. and with witness PeterGhun Hook Wong, was sworn and direct examined.

No appearance by defaulted defendant Sanjeev Rai DBA Imprint CP.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Past Due Rents and Damages: $30,100.00
Attorney's Fees and Costs: $71,567.10
Total Judgment in the amount of $101,667.10

Mr. Dawson to submit a revised Amended Judgement to the court for signing.
